posts.raw_content:
Let's be real: Trump clashing with Pope Francis isn't the political disaster some people make it out to be—it’s actually a brilliant, calculated move.

There is a deep, growing fracture within the Catholic Church, especially here in the United States. A significant portion of conservative and traditional Catholics are deeply alienated by the current papacy's progressive direction. You don't have to look any further than the situation with Archbishop Carlo Maria Viganò. His fierce, vocal opposition to Rome—and his subsequent excommunication—highlighted just how wide the gap has become between traditional American Catholics and the current Vatican leadership.

By pushing back against the Pope, Trump is tapping directly into this exact demographic. He isn't losing the Catholic vote; he's specifically aligning himself with the highly motivated, traditionalist wing of the Church. These voters feel completely abandoned by the Vatican's current trajectory on cultural and social issues.

When Trump stands his ground against the papacy, he steps into the vacuum and positions himself as the defender of the conservative values they care about most. It’s a bold move that capitalizes on an already existing religious divide to lock down a crucial, passionate voting bloc.

Trump should meet with Viganò to light the fire even more.

posts.raw_content:
What you're witnessing in Trump 2.0 is a "quad-angulation" of chynah.

I'll help you connect some dots (and none of them involve Israel BTW).

Trump laid the ground work for this effort in his hiatus between 2020 and his re-election in 2024. He developed the blue print around 2022-23 time frame. His first year of his second term was shoring up some legal stuff and codifying some international agreements. He achieved that in record pace (most were completed in March of 2025, only a few months post inauguration). The rest were completed by July of 2025.

He then set out with the more visible execution of the plan. First to go was Venezuela. A masterfully executed plan to remove the dictator. He didn't need to bomb the shit out of Venezuela (although he did intimate that, but that's how he negotiates). He just needed to snatch the Maduro and we knew they would fall in line. That's the problem with dictators like Maduro, they don't have deep bench of support. Venezuela quickly fell under our orbit after Maduro was black bagged. That's one of chynahs suppliers of oil not to mention they were in talks with chynah for basing rights.

Next up on the game board was Iran. A real pain in the ass. There was only one way to go about it, and that was decapitation. Which we did. Don't believe what the MSM is proffering. Iran's regime is dead. Their capability has been turned to dust and little tiny metal pieces. We went to negotiate with them, again, we knew they would be ridiculous, which they were, and now Trump, being Trump pulled out the reverse Uno card of the Hormuz Blockade. It was all part of the plan and that plan is still unfolding. I can post more about that if you'd like. It's fairly detailed and you have to pay attention.

Anyway Iran is really over the barrel right now and it's only getting worse for what's left there of the "government". Trump just gave them a 2 day ultimatum. My guess is they are back to talks within a day if not already.

Once Iran falls, and it will, that removes yet another source for chynah. We control the Straits, make no mistake about it. We do.

Next up is something not really covered by the news - our newly inked deal with Indonesia. The straits of Malacca is the prize here and with this newly inked deal we are now ostensibly in control of that. Malacca is of strategic importance as it is the main channel for all shipping coming from the Gulf, to chynah for oil. So in less than a month Trump has effectively taken control of the major avenues that chynah gets it's oil from, not to mention cutting off all supply from Venezuela (they are selling it to us now).

It's a brilliant plan and again was designed back in 2022-23 timeframe. The goal of Trump was always to strangle chynah and disrupt their global ambitions without going into a direct confrontation.

For those that hear the MSM trope "there is no plan" that couldn't be farther from the truth.

Watch this play out, Trump is a master. Let him cook
